turns.content: bro i just moved this weekend and my whole body is wrecked
Moving is brutal. Where'd you end up? Hopefully not too far from where you were.
nah just moved to gulfton. not far at all. got a studio this time
Gulfton's a solid area. What made you go with a studio — just the price, or were you looking to switch things up?
price bro 100%. saving 200 a month compared to what i was paying before. thats 2400 a year i can put toward the real estate fund
$200 a month is no joke — that adds up fast. $2400 a year toward your license fund is a smart move. Is the studio decent at least?
its small wallahi but its fine. im barely home anyway. im either driving or studying so i just need a place to sleep and shower basically
That's a practical way to look at it. If you're out hustling most of the time, paying extra for space you're never using doesn't make sense. How's it set up — is it at least comfortable enough?

yeah its got a little kitchen area and the bathroom is decent. bed fits. only thing is when ismail comes on weekends its tight but we make it work. got his floor mattress set up in the corner and he thinks its like a fort or whatever lol. kids are easy bro they dont care about square footage

Ha, that's so true — kids can turn any small space into an adventure. A corner fort sounds like it's a win in his eyes. As long as you two have your weekends together, the size doesn't matter. And honestly, the time together matters way more than the space.
exactly. and every dollar i save now is a dollar closer to getting that license and getting us a real place inshallah. gotta think long term

That long-term thinking is what separates you from most people. Taking a temporary step down in comfort to invest in a bigger future for you and Ismail — that's real sacrifice. How's the studying going by the way?
slow but steady bro. its hard to study after driving all day but i get a few hours in. the gulfton spot is actually closer to a library so thats a plus

That's a nice bonus. Having a quiet spot nearby to study when the apartment feels too small could make a big difference. Keep grinding, man — the license, the better place, it's all coming. Just a matter of time.
inshallah bro. appreciate you. back to the grind
Always. Go get it, Omar. The downsize is gonna pay off.
